case_title: GIANG, AN et al vs. GIOVANNI, EUGENE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GIANG, AN LU, HA AS TO DEFENDANT GIOVANNI, EUGENE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-27-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-29-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-07-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-27-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-26-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFF'S ARE TO APPEAR WITH AN ATTORNEY. IF THEY DO NOT APPEAR WITH COUNSEL THE COURT MAY FIND PLAINTIFF'S IN CONTEMPT AND MAY DISMISS THE CASE. (PLAINTIFF'S TO BRING PROVIDE NEW ATTORNEY WITH A COPY OF THIS NOTICE) HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PLAINTIFFS TO BRING A STATEMENT FROM AAA AGREEING THAT THE CASE IS AN UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE AND SUITABLE FOR ARBITRATION. (ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 5/28/96) HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CONTINUED FOR 2ND TIME FROM 6/27/96: FOR PLTF'S TO BRING A STATEMENT FROM "AAA" AGREEING THAT CASE IS AN UNISURED MOTORIST CASE AND SUITABLE FOR ARBITRATION. HEARING SET FOR JUL-29-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING CONTINUED FOR 3RD TIME TO 8/28/96: PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL FORM OR PROOF OF SERVICE OF DEFENDANT. FAILURE TO FILE SAID DOCUMENTS WITH NO GOOD CAUSE BEING OFFERED, THE COURT WILL DISMISS THIS CASE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
